name: My Sausage Gravy
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Jimmy Dean Sage breakfast sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sausage over medium heat until mostly done.
2. Add the onions and stir occasionally until the sausage is fully cooked and onions are translucent.
3. Stir in the flour and continue stirring for a couple of minutes so it doesn't stick or burn.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except the milk.
5. Let cook for a couple of minutes while stirring constantly.
6. Stir in some milk, using as much as needed to achieve the desired consistency.
7. When you reach the preferred thickness, reduce the heat to low and let simmer for a few minutes to avoid a raw flour taste in your gravy. Do not forget to stir occasionally.
Serve over broken up homemade biscuits (I cannot stand packaged ones with separate layers as they are too flaky).
